reviews.review_description:
Great game ane even better concept, love the coyote there to help motivate you to put it in, only problem is that there is 2 holes and both are only about 8 feet long, there is also 2 balls you start with but there is no way to spawn in a new ball also I would love if the remaining part of the game was free, Amazing game would recommend 
-Egb and KinGayMoney

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and feedback! Our most recent release contains a third hole to the free game and added functionality to automatically respawn the ball if it falls off the course.

reviews.review_description: DO I REALLY HAVE TO PAY TO PLAY THE FULL GAME !ONE STAR THIS GAME SUCKS!
